title: Dumbell Fitness Test #2 2S35# 41 minutes. How strong are Y0U?!

enrichment.summary: Kyle films himself doing a progressive dumbbell workout (sets of 10 reps at 10, 15, 25, and 35 pounds), narrating his form, fatigue, and recovery in real time. He uses this as a personal fitness benchmark, comparing against a previous session and declaring a new record after completing two sets at 35 lbs. He's candid about being out of shape, having asthma flare-ups, and riding his bike five hours the day before.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Dismissive — swinging reps are cheating; full range of motion is required
Honest that he has a 'dad bod' and is out of shape, but visibly proud of incremental progress
Structured rest intervals (30s between sets, 90s between weights) are necessary for recovery and performance
Arms must go fully extended and elbow must reach knee — no partial reps
